## Testing

### Validation
- [ ] Experimental procedure executed successfully
- [ ] Results / data collected
- [ ] Scripts or tools reproducible

### Output Evidence
- [ ] Logs attached
- [ ] Screenshots included
- [ ] Tables / charts / results documented

## Documentation
- [ ] Findings documented
- [ ] Learnings summarized
- [ ] References added (if applicable)
- [ ] Any decisions based on this research are explained

## Checklist
- [ ] Issue linked
- [ ] Experiment clearly described
- [ ] Results are reproducible or well-documented
- [ ] No unintended production changes are included
